caribbean.headline: Small Craft Advisory Issued for Bimini Waters Today
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini is experiencing sustained winds of 24 knots with wave heights reaching 9.4 feet and a dominant NNE swell period of 9 seconds, prompting a Small Craft Advisory for local mariners. Rain chances remain low at 30 percent, while St. Maarten reports lighter winds near 17 knots with less significant sea conditions.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Seas Affect Mykonos Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing moderate winds reaching 26 knots with wave heights up to 6.0 feet and a dominant northerly swell period of 7 seconds. Rain chances are moderate at 48 percent, while Haifa sees lighter winds near 21 knots with less significant sea conditions.
